info.title: FlowLab Internal API
info.description: Internal contract for auth, public customer routes, integration tests, and tenant automations.

post.summary: Create a customer enquiry and quoted job seed record
Run a tenant integration test and persist health state
Generate a draft quote for a tenant customer
Create an invoice draft and payment-ready public record
Create or resend an agreement from an accepted quote
Persist tenant business and branding settings
Sync queued mobile-job-app actions back into tenant job state and event logs
Queue schedule analysis and recommendation generation
Queue retention and reminder automations for a tenant

get.summary: Download tenant automation blueprint templates as a zip archive

post.summary: Accept a public quote and prepare agreement handoff
Record a public invoice payment confirmation
Receive Stripe webhook events for invoice reconciliation
